description: Structured assessment output from the interview. Wrap in <ASSESSMENT> tags.

contactName.description: The contact's name as provided during the conversation, or null if unknown

icpTier.description: Which ICP tier the contact matches, or 'none'

icpProfile.description: Name of the matched ICP profile (e.g. 'AI Infrastructure Engineer') or null

matchConfidence.description: Confidence that the contact matches the identified ICP (0-100)

matchedSignals.description: Specific ICP signals observed during the conversation

personSummary.description: 1-2 sentence summary: who they are, what they do

relevance.description: Why it's relevant to them specifically

url.description: Direct URL for the recommendation if known

isNeotoma.description: True if this is the Neotoma recommendation

referralPotential.description: How likely this contact can refer strong ICP matches

referralNotes.description: Names, companies, communities mentioned as potential referrals

keyInsights.description: Notable quotes, observations, or insights worth Mark's attention

toolsUsed.description: AI tools the contact mentioned using

preferredAiTool.description: The AI tool the contact uses most, for Neotoma install instructions targeting

contactEmail.description: Email if the contact volunteered it
